p2p_enrich.notes:
Added 3 new pass_to_pass repo_tests:
1. test_repo_bash_syntax_verify_script - runs 'bash -n' on the verification script
2. test_repo_python_syntax_check_scripts - runs 'python3 -m py_compile' on CI helper scripts (.github/scripts/check-idor-model-coverage.py, .github/scripts/check-operator-parity.py)
3. test_repo_workflow_yaml_validates - validates workflow YAML files (ci-e2e-playwright.yml, ci-frontend.yml) using yaml.safe_load

CI commands verified in Docker:
- 'bash -n <script>' for shell script syntax validation (exit 0 on valid scripts)
- 'python3 -m py_compile <file>' for Python syntax validation (exit 0 on valid Python)
- 'yaml.safe_load()' via PyYAML for YAML validation (no exception on valid YAML)

The p2p tests with origin: repo_tests all use subprocess.run() to execute real CI commands.

validate.notes: All 4 validation checks passed: Docker build successful; NOP test reward=0 (tests correctly fail on base commit); Gold test reward=1 (14/14 tests pass); Rubric judge ICR=1.0 (added reference field to rubric rule for style comparison)
